# Fenrua

> Fenrua is the public technical evidence interface for FENRUA LABS PTY LTD
> (ABN 62 700 182 663; ACN 700 182 663), an Australian provider of access-only
> AI security infrastructure software, related technology services, and
> evidence-aware intelligence workflows.

Canonical website: https://fenrua.ai/
Company and service boundary: https://fenrua.ai/legal
Architecture: https://fenrua.ai/architecture
Kernel: https://fenrua.ai/kernel
Research: https://fenrua.ai/research
Verification: https://fenrua.ai/verify
Evidence registry: https://fenrua.ai/evidence
Release audit: https://fenrua.ai/audit
Security contact and scope: https://fenrua.ai/security

Fenrua Labs does not offer an investment, token-crowdfunding, exchange,
trading, yield, or financial-return product. Public evidence is limited to each
artifact's stated revision, hash, maturity, method, and limitation. Static
release records must not be interpreted as live-system attestation.
